projectDescription: A Claude Code skill that spawns 5 specialized AI research agents to analyze investment opportunities across crypto, stocks, forex, and commodities, adapting to your risk profile and generating an interactive bilingual dashboard.
keyFeatures: 5 specialized AI agents (4 sector researchers + 1 strategy synthesizer) running in parallel
Dynamic asset discovery — agents find the most relevant assets based on current market conditions
Risk profile adaptation (conservative, moderate, aggressive) affecting recommendations and allocations
Social sentiment analysis from Twitter/X and Reddit per asset
Source cross-referencing with price agreement scoring from 2+ sources
Historical accuracy tracking comparing past recommendations to actual outcomes
Portfolio allocation with suggested % by sector based on risk profile
Cross-sector correlation insights identifying patterns individual agents cannot see
Full Spanish/English bilingual support for both UI and report data
Interactive Next.js dashboard with charts, expandable sector panels, and risk warnings
Fallback HTML report via Python HTTP server when Node.js is unavailable
Scheduling support for daily or weekly automated reports
publicApiSurface: SKILL.md — Orchestrator workflow definition (10-step investment analysis pipeline)
references/agent-prompts.md — Prompts for all 5 agents (Crypto, Stocks, Currencies, Materials, Strategy)
dashboard/public/data/report.json — Generated English report JSON output
dashboard/public/data/report-es.json — Generated Spanish report JSON output
ReportData TypeScript interface — Full report data schema
Asset TypeScript interface — Per-asset data structure
SectorData TypeScript interface — Per-sector output structure
RiskAdjustedPick TypeScript interface — Strategy agent pick schema
Trigger phrases: 'investment analysis', 'analyze markets', 'market report', 'run tododeia'
